tasks.title: Review and Analyze Existing Documentation and README
tasks.description: Read and analyze current docs/ai-agent.md, docs/product-overview.md, docs/contribution-guide.md, docs/user-guide.md, and README.md to identify outdated, missing, or inconsistent information related to product introduction, AI coding agent usage, and new member onboarding.
acceptanceCriteria: A list of documentation sections and README parts that require addition, update, or removal is created
Identified gaps in onboarding guidance and product introduction are documented
tasks.expectedResult: A comprehensive analysis report listing all documentation and README areas to be updated, added, or removed to align with industry standards and onboarding needs

outputPlan.description: Plan document listing required documentation and README updates

metadata.inputContext: Current documentation files and README content
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a clear blueprint for subsequent documentation and README updates

tasks.title: Update docs/product-overview.md to Align with Industry Standards and Introduce AI Coding Agent
tasks.description: Modify docs/product-overview.md to improve clarity, completeness, and structure. Add a dedicated section introducing the AI coding agent integration and its benefits. Ensure the product overview aligns with current software industry documentation standards, emphasizing privacy, offline capability, and AI features.
acceptanceCriteria: Product overview clearly explains the product purpose, key features, and AI coding agent integration
Content is well-structured and free of outdated or ambiguous information
tasks.expectedResult: An updated docs/product-overview.md file with improved introduction, AI coding agent section, and industry-standard documentation style

outputPlan.description: Updated product overview with AI coding agent introduction and improved structure

metadata.inputContext: Documentation update plan, current product-overview.md content
evidence: git diff shows meaningful updates to docs/product-overview.md
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves product introduction and AI coding agent awareness for users and contributors

tasks.title: Revise docs/contribution-guide.md to Include Clear New Member Onboarding Instructions
tasks.description: Enhance docs/contribution-guide.md by adding a new section specifically guiding new members on how to join the project, including prerequisites, setup steps, coding conventions, and AI coding agent usage guidelines. Remove any outdated or redundant information to streamline onboarding.
acceptanceCriteria: Contribution guide contains a clear, step-by-step onboarding section for new members
Coding conventions and AI agent guidelines are up-to-date and easy to understand
Outdated or redundant content is removed
tasks.expectedResult: An updated docs/contribution-guide.md file with comprehensive new member onboarding instructions and AI coding agent guidelines

outputPlan.description: Updated contribution guide with new member onboarding and AI agent usage instructions

metadata.inputContext: Documentation update plan, current contribution-guide.md content
evidence: git diff shows meaningful updates to docs/contribution-guide.md
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Facilitates smooth onboarding of new contributors and clarifies AI coding agent usage

tasks.title: Update docs/ai-agent.md to Reflect Current AI Coding Agent Practices and Standards
tasks.description: Revise docs/ai-agent.md to ensure all guidelines, conventions, and workflows for AI coding agents are current, clear, and aligned with industry best practices. Remove deprecated instructions and add examples or tips for new members working with AI coding agents.
acceptanceCriteria: AI agent documentation is up-to-date and comprehensive
Deprecated or unclear instructions are removed or clarified
Examples or tips for new users are included
tasks.expectedResult: An updated docs/ai-agent.md file with clear, current AI coding agent guidelines and onboarding tips

outputPlan.description: Updated AI coding agent documentation with current practices and onboarding tips

metadata.inputContext: Documentation update plan, current ai-agent.md content
evidence: git diff shows meaningful updates to docs/ai-agent.md
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures AI coding agent documentation is accurate and helpful for contributors

tasks.title: Revise docs/user-guide.md to Include Onboarding and AI Feature Usage Guidance
tasks.description: Update docs/user-guide.md to add clear instructions for new users on how to get started with the product, including AI feature setup and usage. Improve structure and clarity to align with industry standards and ensure the guide is welcoming to new members.
acceptanceCriteria: User guide includes a clear getting started section for new users
AI feature usage instructions are easy to follow
Content is well-structured and free of outdated information
tasks.expectedResult: An updated docs/user-guide.md file with improved onboarding and AI feature usage instructions

outputPlan.description: Updated user guide with onboarding and AI feature usage guidance

metadata.inputContext: Documentation update plan, current user-guide.md content
evidence: git diff shows meaningful updates to docs/user-guide.md
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves user onboarding experience and AI feature adoption

tasks.title: Update README.md to Introduce Product and Guide New Members
tasks.description: Modify README.md to provide a concise, clear introduction to the product, its key features, and AI coding agent integration. Add a new section with quick start instructions for new members to join the project, including setup and contribution guidelines. Remove any outdated or redundant content.
acceptanceCriteria: README includes a clear product introduction and AI coding agent overview
New member onboarding section is concise and actionable
Outdated or redundant content is removed
README follows software industry best practices for open source projects
tasks.expectedResult: An updated README.md file that effectively introduces the product and guides new contributors

outputPlan.description: Updated README with product introduction and new member onboarding guidance

metadata.inputContext: Documentation update plan, current README.md content
evidence: git diff shows meaningful updates to README.md
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Improves first impression and onboarding experience for new users and contributors
